creator: mallocbsd@foxmail.com
text:
Running `script/myapp_server.pl` will complain:

Couldn't instantiate component "MyApp::View::JSON", "Couldn't find a JSON package. Need JSON at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/Catalyst/ScriptRunner.pm line 50.

The latest version 0.35 will work as expected with www/p5-Catalyst-Devel-1.39.
